Metadata.description: Plan your group trips easily and efficiently with Waypoint.

HomePage.metaDescription: Start planning your next group adventure with Waypoint today.
HomePage.heroSubtitle: The ultimate collaborative platform for your group trips. Coordinate places, split expenses, and chat in real-time, all in one place.
HomePage.featuresTitle: Everything you need for a perfect trip
HomePage.featCollabDesc: Vote on destinations and build itineraries together.
HomePage.featExpenseDesc: Track who paid what and settle debts easily.
HomePage.featMapDesc: Discover places with AI and pin them on the map.
HomePage.joinModalDesc: Enter the 8-character invite code provided by the trip organizer.
HomePage.tripNotFound: No trip found with this code.

Footer.description: Plan your group trips easily and efficiently. Waypoint is where your next shared adventure begins.

UserMenu.logoutConfirmDesc: Are you sure you want to log out of your account?

Validations.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
Validations.passwordRegex: Password must contain letters and numbers

VerifyEmail.title: Email Verification
VerifyEmail.success: Your email has been successfully verified!
VerifyEmail.alreadyUsed: This link has already been used.

EmailTemplate.verifyMessage: Welcome to Waypoint! Please click the button below to verify your email address and activate your account.
EmailTemplate.ignoreMessage: If you didn't request this email, you can safely ignore it.
EmailTemplate.resetMessage: We received a request to reset your password. Click the button below to choose a new one. This link will expire in 1 hour.

ForgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
ForgotPassword.description: Enter your email address and we will send you a link to reset your password.
ForgotPassword.successMessage: If an account exists with this email, a reset link has been sent.

Login.title: Welcome Back
Login.description: Enter your email and password to log in

Register.title: Create an Account
Register.description: Enter your details to sign up for Waypoint

OAuth.conflictErrorDesc: This email is already registered with a password. Please log in normally.
OAuth.oauthError: Google login was cancelled or failed.

TripValidations.nameMinLength: Trip name must be at least 3 characters
TripValidations.nameMaxLength: Trip name must be less than 100 characters

TripsDashboard.title: My Trips
TripsDashboard.description: Manage and view all your upcoming and past adventures.
TripsDashboard.emptyDesc: You haven't joined or created any trips yet.

CreateTrip.title: Create a New Trip
CreateTrip.description: Start a new adventure and invite your friends.
